name: python3-bottleneck
title: python3-bottleneck
summary: Fast NumPy array functions written in C (Python 3)
description:
Fast NumPy array functions written in C (Python 3)
Bottleneck is a collection of fast NumPy array functions written in C.
.
Only arrays with data type (dtype) int32, int64, float32, and float64 are
accelerated. All other dtypes result in calls to slower, unaccelerated
functions.
.
This package provides the modules for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-bottleneck because Fast NumPy array functions written in C (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-bottleneck as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-bottleneck with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-bottleneck --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
